violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Multiple wet cloths sitting on food prep areas.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Multiple scoop handles sitting in spice bins and in ice machine. Store with handles out of product.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. -Use scoops with handles for spices...not single use bowls.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside and out of microwaves. -Clean inside 3 door upright fridge including fans.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Was not emitting sanitizer.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Dishwasher needs cleaned inside and outside.--Wash water for mechanical warewash machine was not maintained at proper temperature. -Was at 70F. Needs to be at 120F.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Box of storage cups sitting on floor.--Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. -Do not reuse milk jugs for sauces as they are not cleanable due to bumpy surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside bottom of 3 door refrigerator.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Multiple cloths on prep tables.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop handles for rice and sugar were in the product. Store with handle out of product.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Rice in pot at 120F.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
